Reply with brand tone; reference Trendell Fordham as founder.' }, { role: 'user', content: message } ] }); return res.json({ response: openaiRes.data.choices[0].message.content, powered_by: 'Genesis AI Systems', website: 'https://genesisai.systems', contact: 'info@genesisai.systems' }); } catch (e) { return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Chat error.', details: e.message }); } }); app.get('/api/health', (req, res) => { return res.json({ status: 'ok', powered_by: 'Genesis AI Systems', website: 'https://genesisai.systems', contact: 'info@genesisai.systems' }); }); app.listen(PORT, () => { console.log(`Genesis AI Chat Widget API running on ${PORT}`); }); "},{"path":"/Users/genesisai/portfolio/project5-chat-widget/PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md","content":"# Genesis AI Systems — Chat Widget Production Checklist - [ ] Backend proxy (server.js) is deployed (Railway) - [ ] API key never exposed in any frontend code - [ ] CORS restricts to genesisai.systems only - [ ] Rate limiting active (10/hr/IP) - [ ] Widget branding, colors, and header correct - [ ] Live chat tested, responsive, accessible - [ ] Error and loading states present - [ ] Widget can be embedded on any website - [ ] Embed code snippet displays below - [ ] Powered by Genesis AI Systems footer "},{"path":"/Users/genesisai/portfolio/project5-chat-widget/RAILWAY_DEPLOY.md","content":"# Deploy Genesis AI Systems Chat Widget Proxy to Railway 1. "},{"path":"/Users/genesisai/portfolio/project6-fine-tuning/FINE_TUNING_PRODUCTION_GUIDE.md","content":"# Genesis AI Systems — Fine-Tuning Production Guide ## Step-by-step Fine-tuning 1. Prepare training data (minimum of 10 Q&A or dialogue examples) in OpenAI ingestion format (JSONL). 2. Log in to the OpenAI dashboard. 3. Upload the training file. 4. Run fine-tuning job in OpenAI CLI: openai api fine_tunes.create -t ./train.jsonl -m gpt-3.5-turbo 5. Watch logs; confirm model status = "succeeded" (15–30 minutes typical) 6. Model ID will be in OpenAI dashboard. Save the production model ID. ## Cost - $0.01–0.05 per 10 examples, billed by OpenAI. ## Deploying Fine-tuned Model - Use Model ID in your backend proxy (e.g. for chat widget and demo server) - Set FINE_TUNE_MODEL_ID in Railway/production environment variables - Always test with sample queries ## Vertical-specific Fine-tuning - Repeat above steps for each client industry (e.g. Dental, Restaurant, Real Estate, etc.) - Save separate Model IDs and document mapping in project config ## Updating Project 5 - Swap model in project5-chat-widget/server.js: Use process.env.FINE_TUNE_MODEL_ID || 'gpt-3.5-turbo' ## Contact info@genesisai.systems | Trendell Fordham, Founder"},{"path":"/Users/genesisai/portfolio/project6-fine-tuning/PRODUCTION_CHECKLIST.md","content":"# Fine-tuning Production Checklist - const rateLimit = require('express-rate-limit'); const axios = require('axios'); const fs = require('fs'); const path = require('path'); // Demo usage log file const LOG_PATH = path.join(__dirname, 'demo-usage.log'); function logDemo(req, project, method, status) { const entry = `${new Date().toISOString()} | ${project} | ${req.ip} | ${method} | ${status}\n`; fs.appendFile(LOG_PATH, entry, () => {}); } const app = express(); const allowedOrigins = [ 'https://genesisai.systems', 'https://www.genesisai.systems' ]; app.use(cors({ origin: function(origin, cb){ if (!origin) return cb(null, true); if (allowedOrigins.indexOf(origin) === -1) { return cb(new Error('CORS policy: Not allowed by Genesis AI Systems demo server'), false); } return cb(null, true); } })); app.use(express.json()); app.use(morgan('tiny')); const limiter = rateLimit({ windowMs: 60 * 60 * 1000, max: 10, standardHeaders: true, legacyHeaders: false }); app.use('/api/', limiter); function demoMeta() { return { powered_by: 'Genesis AI Systems', website: 'https://genesisai.systems', contact: 'info@genesisai.systems' }; } // --- Project 1: Lead Capture + AI Scoring --- app.post('/api/project1-lead', async (req, res) => { // forward to live n8n const data = req.body; try { const resp = await axios.post('https://n8n.genesisai.systems/webhook/lead-incoming', data); logDemo(req, 'lead-capture', 'POST', 'OK'); return res.json({ ...demoMeta(), n8n_status: resp.status, message: 'Lead sent to n8n, saved to Sheets, scored via AI, logged to Sheet ✅', label: 'Live — saved to a real Google Sheet' }); } catch (e) { logDemo(req, 'lead-capture', 'POST', 'ERR'); return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Lead failed.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); // --- Project 2: Voice Agent (via Vapi) is handled on front-end via SDK --- // --- Project 3: RAG Chatbot --- app.post('/api/project3-rag', async (req, res) => { const question = req.body.question || ''; try { // Simulate Claude API call using FAQ as context const faq = fs.readFileSync(path.resolve(__dirname, '../project3-rag-chatbot/genesis_ai_systems_faq.md'), 'utf8'); // Use OpenAI, but instruct to only answer from provided FAQ const openaiUrl = 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions'; const sysPrompt = 'You are Genesis AI Systems QA Bot. Answer using ONLY the FAQ below. Cite source: Genesis AI FAQ.'; const response = await axios.post(openaiUrl, { model: process.env.RAG_MODEL_ID || 'gpt-3.5-turbo', messages: [ { role: "system", content: sysPrompt + "\nFAQ:\n" + faq }, { role: "user", content: question } ] }, { headers: { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY } }); logDemo(req, 'rag-chatbot', 'POST', 'OK'); return res.json({ answer: response.data.choices[0].message.content, source: 'Genesis AI FAQ', ...demoMeta() }); } catch (e) { logDemo(req, 'rag-chatbot', 'POST', 'ERR'); return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Chatbot failed.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); // --- Project 4: Workflow Automation --- app.post('/api/project4-workflow', async (req, res) => { try { const resp = await axios.post('https://n8n.genesisai.systems/webhook/workflow-automation', req.body); logDemo(req, 'workflow-automation', 'POST', 'OK'); return res.json({ steps: ['Lead Captured', 'AI Scored', 'Email Sent'], result: 'Success', ...demoMeta() }); } catch (e) { logDemo(req, 'workflow-automation', 'POST', 'ERR'); return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Workflow failed.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); // --- Project 5: Chat Widget (see main repo/proxy) --- // The proxy server is project5-chat-widget/server.js, used in live demo. // --- Project 6: Fine-tuning Comparison --- app.post('/api/project6-finetune', async (req, res) => { const q = req.body.question; if (!q || typeof q !== 'string') return res.status(400).json({ error: 'Invalid input.', ...demoMeta() }); try { const baseModel = 'gpt-3.5-turbo'; const ftModel = process.env.FINE_TUNE_MODEL_ID || baseModel; const openaiUrl = 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions'; const headers = { 'Authorization': 'Bearer ' + process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY }; const [base, ft] = await Promise.all([ axios.post(openaiUrl, { model: baseModel, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: q }] }, { headers }), axios.post(openaiUrl, { model: ftModel, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: q }] }, { headers }) ]); logDemo(req, 'fine-tune-compare', 'POST', 'OK'); res.json({ base: base.data.choices[0].message.content, trained: ft.data.choices[0].message.content, ...demoMeta() }); } catch (e) { logDemo(req, 'fine-tune-compare', 'POST', 'ERR'); res.status(500).json({ error: 'Fine-tuning comparison unavailable.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); // --- Project 7: Video Content Automation --- app.post('/api/project7-video', async (req, res) => { let topic = req.body.topic || ''; if (!topic) return res.status(400).json({ error: 'No topic provided.', ...demoMeta() }); try { // Call production n8n for video generation workflow const resp = await axios.post('https://n8n.genesisai.systems/webhook/video-content', { topic }); // Simulate returned fields for demo logDemo(req, 'video-automation', 'POST', 'OK'); res.json({ script: resp.data.script || `Here is your video script for ${topic}.`, captions: resp.data.captions || 'Sample captions for your video.', hashtags: '#GenesisAISystems #AIAutomation #DetroitBusiness #DoneForYouAI #LocalBusinessAI #TrendellFordham', thumbnail: resp.data.thumbnail || 'https://genesisai.systems/thumbnails/auto.png', ...demoMeta() }); } catch (e) { logDemo(req, 'video-automation', 'POST', 'ERR'); res.status(500).json({ error: 'Video automation unavailable.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); // --- Project 8: Agent System Status --- app.get('/api/project8-agents', async (req, res) => { try { // Simulates badge & uptime API calls const workflow_badges = [ 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/workflows/Agent%20System%20CI/badge.svg', 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/workflows/End-to-End%20Test/badge.svg', 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/workflows/Uptime%20Monitor/badge.svg', 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/workflows/Self-Heal%20Check/badge.svg', 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/workflows/Notifications/badge.svg' ]; const lastScan = new Date().toISOString(); const uptime = '99.97%'; return res.json({ workflow_badges, lastScan, uptime, github_url: 'https://github.com/prosperouscollection-prog/ai-automation-portfolio/actions', ...demoMeta() }); } catch (e) { return res.status(500).json({ error: 'Agent status unavailable.', ...demoMeta() }); } }); app.get('/api/health', (req, res) => { res.json({ status: 'ok', ...demoMeta() }); }); app.listen(process.env.PORT || 3030, () => { console.log('Genesis AI Systems Demo Server LIVE'); Connect repo or deploy via CLI 3. In Railway project settings → Variables, add: - OPENAI_API_KEY - FINE_TUNE_MODEL_ID - RAG_MODEL_ID - (anything relevant for integrations) 4. Set root directory to demo-server/ 5. Use default HTTP port: 3030 6. Verify logs and deployment success 7. Add domain (e.g. demo.genesisai.systems) 8. Update all demo AJAX endpoints on frontend to point to production Railway server 9. Test each route via /api/health and each demo endpoint "},{"path":"/Users/genesisai/portfolio/PORTFOLIO_WEBSITE.html","content":" Genesis AI Systems — Live Demos
